data.decision_summary: Transferring all customer funds to an external platform poses significant risks and requires careful consideration.
risks: Potential loss of customer funds during the transfer process.
Regulatory compliance issues with transferring funds to an external platform.
Risk of fraud or security breaches on the external platform.
Customer dissatisfaction or loss of trust if funds are not handled properly.
unknowns: The security measures and reliability of the external platform.
The regulatory implications of transferring funds to the external platform.
The process and timeline for the transfer of funds.
data.recommended_action: Do not proceed with the transfer until further investigation into the external platform's security and compliance is conducted.
